betterquesting:10.desc:8:
You now have 'free' resources - welcome to the midgame! In order to process all the ores you are now getting, you need to build a robust ore processing setup. However, this is CE, and it has to be funky. §c§lYou need to avoid backstuffing your oreproc setup.§r  This means you have a few options.

a) Ensure each machine in the line is §nfaster than all those previous§r, or
b) Ensure that each machine §nauto-outputs into a trash can§r on low priority, using lasers or AE subnets to route.  

Option A means limiting the overall speed of your setup, and option B means voiding products at each step of the way as required. The choice is up to you. For more advice when it comes to setting up a performant ore processing setup, ask in the discord. 

§c§lYou really dont want to ignore this - the current record for TPS in a superflat world containing nothing but oreproc is 0.13 TPS, or ~153x slower than normal, done by yours truly.  §r
